attacking_style: Launches solo attacks inside 25km on gradual finish terrain, deliberately avoiding steep climbing finishes where larger physique becomes a disadvantage.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Gradual finishing gradients that favor power over pure climbing ability; exposed on steep climbs where weight-to-power ratio becomes critical.
vulnerability: Steep climbing finishes where his larger rider physiology creates physiological disadvantages compared to pure climbers.
key_patterns: Solo attacks from breakaways rather than group sprints or late selections.
Strategic timing to finish on gradual terrain avoiding steep climb disadvantages.
Targets breakaway opportunities in Grand Tours for stage wins.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation insufficient to determine trajectory, but showed strong tactical awareness and execution
